    Validates a category's fields.

    Tries to parse a string as a positive BigDecimal.

    Validates all fields of a transaction.

    Validates a password change request.

    Validates a user profile edit form.

    Validates a user registration form.

    Validates sign in credentials.

    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.model.TransactionType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Navigates to the Manage Transactions screen.
